pages.title: Home
pages.description: The public front door for GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension: identity, posture, proof-settlement institution, and guided paths.

pages.title: GoalOS Care Command
pages.description: Front-and-center local GoalOS command experience: one plain-language objective box, clear guidance, Ask GoalOS chat routing, Mission Contract, Evidence Docket plan, Verifier Mesh, route handoff, and downloadable receipt.
pages.boundary: Browser-local guidance and mission packaging only; no account, no form submission, no wallet, no token approval, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no network request from the console, no user data retained, no production authority.

pages.title: Canonical Proof Institution
pages.description: Final public proof-institution command room: route integrity, proof doctrine, public-safe boundary, documentation spine, and next best user paths in one place.
pages.boundary: Browser-local institution map; no account, no form, no wallet, no network request from the demo, no user data, no production authority.

pages.title: GoalOS Take-Care Console

pages.boundary: Browser-local command planning only; no account, no form submission, no wallet, no token approval, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no network request from the console, no user data retained, no production authority.

pages.title: GoalOS Command Console

pages.title: Ask GoalOS Concierge
pages.description: Browser-local question router that answers public-site questions instantly and routes visitors to the right proof page, console, evidence room, legal boundary, or route index without sending data anywhere.
pages.boundary: Browser-local guidance only; no account, no form submission, no wallet, no network request, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no user data retained, no production authority.

pages.title: GoalOS Mission Autopilot
pages.description: Separate high-level public-safe console: type one plain-language objective and GoalOS assembles a Mission Contract, proof plan, Evidence Docket outline, governed decision state, Action Graph, Chronicle entry, and local MissionAutopilotReceipt.
pages.boundary: Browser-local mission planning only; no account, no form submission, no wallet, no token approval, no network request from the console, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no user data retained, no production authority.

pages.title: Experience Command
pages.description: The single command-grade route for every preserved demo, proof room, loop theatre, RSI console, ASI-horizon boundary, legal page, archive, and evidence surface.
pages.boundary: Navigation and route-discovery only; no account, no form, no wallet, no network request, no user data.

pages.title: Complete Route Index

pages.title: AGIALPHA Boundary
pages.description: States AGIALPHA is not available from the site and is not sold, offered, custodied, brokered, routed, redeemed, market-made, or recommended.

pages.title: Legal Boundary
pages.description: Plain-language legal and data-zero boundary.

pages.title: Privacy
pages.description: States no user data wanted, no analytics, no cookies, no forms, and no browser storage.

pages.title: Regulatory Boundary
pages.description: Clarifies no investment, financial, legal, or regulated-service posture.

pages.title: Terms
pages.description: Use boundaries and disclaimers for public demos.

pages.title: Third-Party Responsibility
pages.description: Places third-party wallet, market, RPC, tax, sanctions, securities, privacy, and jurisdiction responsibility on users/operators.

pages.title: Action Graph Handoff
pages.description: Turns governed decisions into scoped action graphs with handoff and rollback boundaries.

pages.title: Mission Studio
pages.description: Plain-language mission drafting surface for public-safe mission packages.

pages.title: Until-DONE Mission Control
pages.description: Demonstrates run-to-completion: GoalOS stops at proof, not at output.

pages.title: Expert Console
pages.description: Separated expert surface with explicit human authority boundaries.

pages.title: Expert Mainnet Console
pages.description: Separated Mainnet operations chamber requiring deliberate human wallet authority if used.

pages.title: Operator Console
pages.description: Read-only operator posture for reviewing proof-state surfaces.

pages.title: Coordination Engine
pages.description: Explains the proof-gated coordination engine behind multi-agent institutional work.

pages.title: Coordination Lab
pages.description: Compares swarm, fixed crew, and institution coordination under proof gates.

pages.title: Multi-Agent Institution
pages.description: Shows why large systems coordinate best as proof-governed institutions, not swarms.

pages.title: Claim Firewall
pages.description: Blocks overclaims and separates architecture claims from empirical claims.

pages.title: Evidence Docket Composer
pages.description: Turns a claim into a public/private evidence room with replay and risk gates.

pages.title: Evidence Docket Court
pages.description: Courtroom metaphor for evaluating claims against evidence, risk, and replay.

pages.title: Evidence Room
pages.description: Persistent evidence entrypoint and public-safe proof context for Evidence Dockets, proof rooms, claim boundaries, and review paths.
pages.boundary: Public proof context; no private evidence submission.

pages.title: Replay Gauntlet
pages.description: Stress-tests proof claims against replay, contradiction, risk, and rollback defects.

pages.title: Documentation
pages.description: Documentation entrypoint for users who want the public repo, proof doctrine, route map, and implementation guidance.
pages.boundary: Repository docs only; no user data.

pages.title: ASI Proof Horizon Console
pages.description: A browser-local control room showing how a restartable loop becomes RSI governance, then enters an ASI-horizon proof firewall with evidence, baselines, containment, council review, rollback, and Chronicle gates.
pages.boundary: Governance demonstration only; ASI is treated as a future proof horizon, not an achievement claim.

pages.title: Day-Scale Loop Observatory
pages.description: Shows how a long-running agent loop becomes a restartable, trace-readable, proof-gated institution instead of a fragile prompt session.
pages.boundary: Browser-local simulation; no external action, no wallet, no production authority.

pages.title: From Loop to RSI
pages.description: Shows how a long-running agent loop becomes AGI Alpha RSI: deterministic invention governance with target, emit, filter, atlas, test-plan, eval, insert, promote, replay integrity, ECI, Move-37 skepticism, and dossier export.
pages.boundary: Browser-local simulation; no outcome authority, no wallet, no network, no production autonomy.

pages.title: From Loop to RSI
pages.description: Shows how long-running agent loops become deterministic RSI governance: target, emit, filter, atlas, test-plan, eval, insert, promote, Move-37 dossier, and outcome authority by evidence.
pages.boundary: Browser-local control-plane simulation; no production authority.

pages.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Governance Console
pages.description: A public-safe console showing how restartable loops become RSI governance and how future ASI-class capability remains inside proof, replay, baseline, persistence, risk, council, and human authority gates.
pages.boundary: Public-safe browser-local governance demonstration; no achieved ASI claim.

pages.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Governance Corridor
pages.description: Companion corridor view for capability pressure, proof gates, containment, council review, and human-boundary discipline.
pages.boundary: Public-safe browser-local governance demonstration; no achieved ASI claim.

pages.title: Loop Contract Theatre
pages.description: Contract-first long-running loop demonstration: separated roles, virtual disk state, restart, trace reading, proof scoring, harness reduction, and LoopReceipt export.

pages.title: Loop Evidence Reactor
pages.description: Shows long-running agent loops as proof-gated state machines: contract, virtual disk, crash/restart, trace reading, harness deletion, bottleneck exposure, and LoopDocket export.
pages.boundary: Browser-local simulation; no user data, wallet, network, or production authority.

pages.title: Loop Operating Room
pages.description: Turns long-running agent work into a proof-governed loop: contract, roles, traces, restarts, evaluator scores, Evidence Docket, Chronicle, and bottleneck visibility.
pages.boundary: Browser-local simulation; no wallet, no network, no user data, no external action.

pages.title: Superintelligence Proof Governance Console
pages.description: A browser-local GoalOS control room for the Loop → RSI → ASI horizon: evidence contact, baselines, replay, Move-37 stress, council review, capacity allocation, and human boundary gates.
pages.boundary: Public-safe governance simulation only; no achieved ASI claim and no production authority.

pages.title: Artifact Passport
pages.description: Shows how accepted proof becomes portable, reusable capability with lineage and rollback metadata.

pages.title: Chronicle Lab
pages.description: Demonstrates accepted proof entering Chronicle and becoming reusable capability.

pages.title: Proof Cards
pages.description: Compact cards for proof doctrine, boundaries, and public-safe claims.

pages.title: Proof Constitution Simulator
pages.description: Makes Aim -> Act -> Prove -> Evolve visible through protocol objects and gates.

pages.title: Proof Gradient Arena
pages.description: Shows proof, eval, risk, canary, rollback, scope, and challenge gates selecting what may propagate.

pages.title: Proof-to-Action Theatre
pages.description: The cleanest objective -> proof -> governed decision state walkthrough.

pages.title: Router Observatory
pages.description: Shows proof-conditioned routing: choose the smallest sufficient constellation under cost/risk/proof constraints.

pages.title: Trust Equation Simulator
pages.description: Shows why output becomes institutional work only after proof, validation, settlement, and reuse.

pages.title: Upgrade Foundry
pages.description: Demonstrates proof-backed upgrade rights: no propagation without proof, eval, rollback, and scope.

pages.title: Architecture
pages.description: Explains separation of proof, presentation, execution, public pages, schemas, and expert surfaces.

pages.title: Assurance
pages.description: Assurance posture, automation checks, and public-safe invariants.

pages.title: Demo Lab
pages.description: Legacy demo entry surface retained for preservation.

pages.title: Verification
pages.description: Explains verification scripts, build checks, and claim-boundary tests.

pages.title: Experience Atlas
pages.description: Advanced journey map for demos, proof rooms, and boundary pages.

pages.title: Experience Stream
pages.description: Shows how validated work becomes governed experience for future routing and memory.

pages.title: Navigation Atlas
pages.description: Navigation topology and recommended route paths.

pages.title: Site Atlas
pages.description: Static map of every public route and status group.

pages.title: Benchmark Bridge
pages.description: Maps public-safe demos to real-task benchmark requirements and falsification.

pages.title: Inflow Control
pages.description: Shows why compute, tasks, data, incentives, feedback, governance, and tools need regulated inflow.

pages.title: MandateEpoch Clearinghouse
pages.description: Shows how high-volume proof receipts can be batched, quarantined, and cleared without exposing private work.

pages.title: Proof-Settlement Lifecycle
pages.description: Walks through Request -> Escrow -> Execute -> Proof -> Validate -> Settle -> Chronicle.

pages.title: Sovereign Machine Economy
pages.description: Shows integrated Meta-Agentic cognition, Alpha Node runtime, AGI Jobs work OS, and settlement route.
pages.boundary: Public-safe route plus separated expert handoff.
